docket_entries.description: SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, CASE SETTLED. JUDGE PRO TEM ORA PROCHOVNICKL, NOT REPORTED, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA (218).

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO G.C. 68511.3 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, RENITA ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF JURY FEES AND EXPENSES PURSUANT TO CRC 3.50 - 3.63 (CRC 3.62)
REQUEST TO SET CASE FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HNOUSING CLINIC, INC. JURY TRIAL SET FOR MAY-11-2009 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
NOTICE OF LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION, U.D. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE FILED BY DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, RENITA MINGRONE, DENISE MARIE ASSIGNED TO REPRESENT PARTY FOR U. D. SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HNOUSING CLINIC, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, RENITA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 34 SIXTH STREET #407, #SAN FRANCISCO, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, AN IMMEDIATE WRIT OF POSSESSION FOR THE ABOVE PREMISES WILL ISSUE AND PLAINTIFF WILL DEPOSIT EVICTION FEES WITH THE SHERIFF OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO FOR PREPOSTING OF THE PREMISES; HOWEVER, PLAINTIFF WILL STAY EXECUTION OF THIS WRIT ON THE CONDITION THAT DEFENDANT VACATE THE PREMISES ON OR BEFORE 5 PM ON 6-2-09. IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT VACATE BY THE ABOVE DATE AND TIME, PLAINTIFF WILL HAVE AN AMENDED JUDGMENT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAY-06-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 218
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $16.43 FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN HNOUSING CLINIC, INC.
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT LAWRENCE, RENITA
